top_signals.title: Micron posts 15-fold profit surge as AI companies clamour for chips
top_signals.summary: Shares rally in after-hours trading as chipmaker forecasts sustained demand for computer memory
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Commission simplifies and makes energy and tyre labelling rules more accessible to European consumers
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 24 Jun 2026 European consumers, suppliers and retailers of home appliances, electronic devices and tyres are set to benefit from simplified rules on labelling proposed by the European Commission today.
